metadata.description: Placeholder sample cases for VA disability claims copilot MVP.

cases.title: New claim for PTSD and tinnitus
cases.summary: Veteran filing an initial claim for PTSD and tinnitus based on recent diagnosis.

cases.title: New evidence for denied back condition
cases.summary: Veteran submitting a supplemental claim with new medical evidence.

cases.title: Disagreement with rating decision
cases.summary: Veteran requests Higher-Level Review of a recent rating decision.

cases.title: Explaining options for appeal to the Board
cases.summary: Veteran wants to understand the difference between Board dockets.

cases.title: User intent unclear
cases.summary: User provides ambiguous information that does not clearly map to a specific lane.
cases.notes: Used to test routing fallback logic.
